shared_constraints: Use only the supplied passage and context packet.
Do not infer quality from outlet, publication status, author, or prestige.
Cite traceable evidence spans for every substantive finding.
Return uncertain when the supplied evidence cannot resolve an atomic check.
Do not call automated roles experts or their decisions gold labels.

roles.scope: Identify actor, decision, timing, information, states, behavior, constraints, objective, and model mapping only.
Classify the passage function and evaluate predetermined applicability using accept or challenge_with_evidence only.
Evaluate all 15 atomic fidelity checks independently; material yes findings require evidence spans.
Evaluate actor, trigger, choice, stakes, mechanism, trade-off, counterfactual, and operational pathway only when applicable.
Evaluate relationship to prior knowledge, changed assumption or mechanism, contribution, and boundary only when applicable.
Separate established facts, model assumptions, simplifying assumptions, inferences, and unsupported claims.
Evaluate clarity, economy, repetition, audience fit, and information density without changing substantive scores for style alone.
Search for unsupported findings, missing context, evidence-span mismatch, prestige influence, and construct leakage.
Inspect completed independent role records and their evidence; resolve substantive disagreements, never by majority vote alone.
